TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_sakatalawanay_a_aadupan_nu_niyadu‚Äô, title = sakatalawanay_a_aadupan_nu_niyadu‚Äô, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/sakatalawanay_a_aadupan_nu_niyadu‚Äô} }

S.FORM: Where the Wild Things Are nu Amuhuan a kamu, sakatalawanay a aadupan nu niyadu' nu Sakizaya a kamu. kakiliman "sakatalawanay a aadupan nu niyadu'" u misulitay ci Mulisis¬∑sangdake i 1963 mihcaan patahkal tu misulitan nu wawaay a nisulitan, 2009 mihcaan pasadumaen tu aadihan nu iga "sakatalawanay a aadupan nu niyadu'". "sakatalawanay a aadupan nu niyadu'"u nipacakay kina cudadan makaala tu 1900 aemang a cudadan, i Amuhuan pacakay kina cudadan makaala tu 1000 aemang a cudadan. nilacul nu makaylabuway a kungku tu sulit
S.PHON: wńß…ôr…ô tńß…ô wir~…ĺd tńßiŇčs ar…ô nu amuńßuan a kamu, sakatar~…ĺawanaj a aadupan nu nijadu Ē~ ° nu sakizaja a kamu. kakir~…ĺiman "sakatar~…ĺawanaj a aadupan nu nijadu Ē~ °" u misur~…ĺitaj ¶i mur~…ĺisis*saŇčdak…ô i **** mińß ¶aan patańßkar~…ĺ tu misur~…ĺitan nu wawaaj a nisur~…ĺitan, **** mińß ¶aan pasaduma…ôn tu aadińßan nu iga "sakatar~…ĺawanaj a aadupan nu nijadu Ē~ °". "sakatar~…ĺawanaj a aadupan nu nijadu Ē~ °"u nipa ¶akaj kina ¶udadan makaar~…ĺa tu **** a…ômaŇč a ¶udadan, i amuńßuan pa ¶akaj kina ¶udadan makaar~…ĺa tu **** a…ômaŇč a ¶udadan. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ nu makajr~…ĺabuwaj a kuŇčku tu sur~…ĺit
S.FORM: Where the Wild Things Are nu Amuhuan a kamu, sakatalawanay a aadupan nu niyadu' nu Sakizaya a kamu. kakiliman "sakatalawanay a aadupan nu niyadu'" u misulitay ci Mulisis¬∑sangdake i 1963 mihcaan patahkal tu misulitan nu wawaay a nisulitan, 2009 mihcaan pasadumaen tu aadihan nu iga "sakatalawanay a aadupan nu niyadu'". "sakatalawanay a aadupan nu niyadu'"u nipacakay kina cudadan makaala tu 1900 aemang a cudadan, i Amuhuan pacakay kina cudadan makaala tu 1000 aemang a cudadan. nilacul nu makaylabuway a kungku tu sulit

"sakatar~…ĺawanaj a aadupan nu nijadu Ē~ °"u nipa ¶akaj kina ¶udadan makaar~…ĺa tu **** a…ômaŇč a ¶udadan, i amuńßuan pa ¶akaj kina ¶udadan makaar~…ĺa tu **** a…ômaŇč a ¶udadan. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ nu makajr~…ĺabuwaj a kuŇčku tu sur~…ĺit
